_comment: Mobile DJ rig — 2 wash bars, 1 derby, 1 strobe, no moving heads. 20 DMX channels. Most constrained template.
name: Mobile DJ
description: Portable rig that fits in a van and sets up in 30 minutes. Two 6-channel RGBAW+UV LED wash bars (T-bar mounted) provide full-colour wash. One derby/moonflower effect adds rotating split beams for texture. One LED strobe. No moving heads — movement_enable cues are silently skipped. Strobe rate capped at 8 Hz for all-ages and small-venue safety. Single colour zone only.

wash_all.label: Wash Bars
wash_all.description: Two 6-channel RGBAW+UV LED bars on a T-bar stand, aimed at the dance floor. Addressed identically so they always match colour.

fixtures.note: No dedicated dimmer channel; master intensity is achieved by scaling all colour channels proportionally.

back_wash.label: Back Wash (aliased to wash_all)
back_wash.description: No separate rear fixtures. Cues targeting back_wash are rerouted to wash_all with intensity scaled to 70%.

spots.label: Derby Effect
spots.description: One 2-channel derby/moonflower: motor speed on ch 1, colour on ch 2 (fixed colour wheel). No DMX colour mixing — colours are selected by DMX value ranges.

moving_heads.label: Moving Heads (not available)
moving_heads.description: No moving heads in this rig. All movement_enable cues are silently dropped by the constraint filter.

strobe.label: LED Strobe
strobe.description: Single compact LED strobe bar. Rate capped at 8 Hz per constraints.

constraints.note: movement_enable cues must be silently dropped — there are no moving heads. All colour operations are single-zone. back_wash cues fall through to wash_all at 70% scale. Derby motor is treated as a coarse movement proxy during drops only.

cue_rendering.wash: Both wash bars set to target colour via proportional channel scaling (no dimmer channel). Single zone only — L and R always match.
cue_rendering.pulse: Both bars scale all colour channels to peak_intensity * current_colour, then ramp back. Derby motor set to 40% speed during pulses to add texture without distraction.
cue_rendering.strobe_hit: strobe_1 fires at requested intensity, rate capped at 8 Hz. Wash bars briefly go full white (255,255,255,0,255,0) for one frame to reinforce the hit visually, then return to section colour.
cue_rendering.color_shift: Both wash bars crossfade to new colour. Derby color_select channel updated to nearest matching wheel position. No zones — colour is uniform.
cue_rendering.movement_enable: DROPPED — no moving heads. Derby motor speed is adjusted instead: intro/breakdown=slow (40), build=medium (120), drop=fast (220).
cue_rendering.fade_out: All channel values scaled linearly toward zero. Derby motor ramped to 0 over last 2 bars.
